Enterprise AI Workbench

A separate AI demonstration module.

This page is intentionally modular. The core executive site is complete without it; the interactive AI demonstration can be developed, reviewed, and activated separately.

Reserved module

The final Workbench should show AI turning messy enterprise context into a decision leaders can trust.

The live version should demonstrate work, data, evidence, controls, human judgment, and decision quality without using confidential data or public visitor input.

Until that module is ready, this route is not indexed, not listed in the navigation, and not included in the sitemap.
